fromMailbox.description: The shared mailbox or user to send as (userPrincipalName or email address).

cc.description: Array of CC recipient email addresses.

bcc.description: Array of BCC recipient email addresses.

saveToSentItems.description: Whether to save the email in Sent Items.

attachments.description: Array of attachment objects: { name, contentType, contentBytes(base64) }.

dryRun.description: If true, do not send; just output the payload.
